final_prompt.prompt:
Create a documentary-style editorial photograph for a 微博 news/trending post banner.

Style/medium: needs a photojournalistic, high-end mobile-shot documentary aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 wide horizontal layout with generous negative space for text overlay; city skyline as dominant horizontal sweep
Subject: must include a city at dusk — pedestrians in motion, neon signs beginning to glow, distant skyscrapers reflecting sunset light
Scene/backdrop: must include an urban dusk skyline with dramatic light-shadow contrast and strong sense of real on-scene presence
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic golden-hour-to-neon transition atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm-to-cool dusk direction with high contrast — exact tonal ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sharp, high-resolution 8K-texture quality — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "城市里的安静时刻" (large, primary headline, bold/modern typeface, prominent placement); "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" (secondary subtitle); "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" (small watermark, bottom-right or bottom area)
Constraints: must preserve strict 16:9 ratio; horizontal composition with sufficient clear zones for text legibility; all three text elements placed as specified
Avoid:
